theme: Social Media — More Harm or Good

sentences.english: Do you think social media does more harm than good?
sentences.korean: 소셜 미디어가 이로운 것보다 해로운 것이 더 많다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I think social media does more good than harm when used responsibly.
sentences.korean: 책임감 있게 사용하면 소셜 미디어가 해보다 이익이 더 많다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First it connects people across the world.
I have friends in Japan and Brazil who I stay in touch with only through social media.
sentences.korean: 일본과 브라질에 있는 친구들과 소셜 미디어를 통해서만 연락해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Social Media — More Harm or Good
Eating at Home vs. Eating Out

theme: Social Media — More Harm or Good

sentences.english: Second it provides a platform for small businesses and creators to reach audiences without expensive advertising.
sentences.korean: 둘째 소규모 사업체와 크리에이터에게 비싼 광고 없이 관객에게 도달할 플랫폼을 제공해요.

sentences.english: The key is moderation — setting daily time limits and being mindful of what content you consume.
sentences.korean: 핵심은 절제예요 — 하루 시간 제한을 설정하고 어떤 콘텐츠를 소비하는지 주의하는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
